chinese_news.title: 功效洗护市场，跑不出下一个完美日记
chinese_news.summary:
走进美国 Sephora、Ulta 或欧洲 Douglas 这样的美妆零售集合店，货架上的景象或许会让你感到意外：占据大量陈列面积的，不只是护肤品，还有护发产品。从基础清洁，到去屑、防脱，再到头皮微生态、蛋白键修护、抗热损伤等护理产品，护发区的复杂程度已经几乎与护肤区无异。

根据市场研究机构 Circana 的数据，2025 年美国高端护发零售市场同比增长 8%，是高端美妆所有品类中增速最快的——超过彩妆（4%）、护肤（3%），仅次于香水（5%）。但比增速更值得关注的是品类的内部结构：基础洗发水与护发素仅实现个位数增长，而修护治疗类（Treatments）与造型类产品——那些主打烫染修护、蛋白键修复、头皮健康的高附加值品类——则以双位数速度扩张。其中头皮护理已连续三年保持双位数增长，新品发布数量同比上升 20% 以上，且绝大多数是修护治疗类产品。

中国市场也出现了相似的结构性分化。据 Joy Group 战略总监 Stefan Huang 引述的行业数据，2025 年上半年中国线上洗护市场整体增速几近停滞，仅为 0.09%；而中高端价格带却逆势

chinese_news.title: 珀莱雅收购花知晓，但美妆界的“安踏”还没诞生
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜任彩茹

编辑｜乔芊

一家富有“少女心”与“童话感”的美妆新锐品牌，找到了自己的阶段性归宿。

5月21日晚，珀莱雅公告称，旗下全资子公司珀莱雅（海南）拟以3.51亿元现金收购深圳花知晓电子商务有限公司12.5479%的股权。交易完成后，珀莱雅对花知晓的持股比例将从38.4521%提升至51%。财务层面，花知晓也将正式纳入珀莱雅的合并报表范围。

珀莱雅关于收购花知晓部分股权的公告

珀莱雅正在推进“A+H”上市，此时控股花知

chinese_news.title: 对话VITURE姜公略：什么才是XR眼镜该有的样子？
chinese_news.summary:
过去十年，XR（扩展现实）赛道始终陷在一种怪异的叙事里——

在从业者高呼着“下一代计算平台”的宏大愿景时，资本市场也曾在元宇宙的热潮中疯狂押注，而一旦落地到消费端，这个行业却始终未能摆脱极客玩具的宿命。

从Google Glass的黯然退场，再到一众VR/AR厂商的折戟，XR行业在跌宕中，迎来了前所未有的冷静时刻。

行业的艰辛在于，尽管所有人都清楚技术终局，但抵达终局的路径却布满荆棘。在种种“不可能三角”中，行业在缺乏共识中蜿蜒前进。

在略显沉闷的行业氛围中，XR厂商VITURE近日发布了一款全新产品——VITURE Beast。作为一个此前主攻海外游戏市场、鲜少发声的“隐形冠军”，VITURE此次转向强攻中国市场，且逐渐走出了游戏叙事的举动，自然引发了行业不少关注。

VITURE创始人兼CEO姜公略在发布会上直言，这款产品是不是简单的升级，而是一款集过去三年研发成果、“跃迁性”的产品。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：下一个杀手级AI产品，会出现在哪个赛道？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
下一个杀手级AI产品，是眼镜、是Agent，还是某个尚未命名的“物理世界入口”？这场圆桌没有标准答案，却达成一个共识：单纯套壳大模型的应用注定短命，只有长期在线、连接物理世界、能完成真实交互闭环的产品，才可能成为下一个百亿级赛道。从AI眼镜到具身智能，入口之争已悄然打响。

硬件先行还是生态为王？C端规模还是B端付费？最终指向同一个逻辑：纯套壳应用、弱交互硬件注定被淘汰，只有“多模态底座+AI原生智能体+可穿戴硬件”三位一体，才能让AI从聊天框真正走进现实。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

<

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：当AI进入产业前线：未来最稀缺的AI人才，会是谁？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
稀缺的，到底是懂AI的人，还是懂业务的人？

一个反直觉的判断——懂AI这件事正在快速贬值，而能在关键低频决策中做出判断的人，才是未来的稀缺品。高频重复的工作最容易被AI替代，但在打造爆品、建立品牌等低频高影响力的决策上，人的判断依然不可替代，企业AI转型的最大卡点也不是技术或数据，而是“想不到应用场景”， 当前AI的利润大头仍在基础设施层，应用端的ROI尚未完全释放，但拐点会比预想来得更快。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

郑王宇丨36氪基金投资副总裁（主持）

龚毅丨

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：人才特种兵：“AI原生人才”与“产业老炮”的共生手册| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
真正AI原生的人，甚至不会来这个现场。但对于那些积极转型的20%，如何找到、培养并留住他们，这里有一本实战手册。

只有1%的企业是AI原生企业，20%积极拥抱变化，80%在苦苦挣扎；人才亦然。圆桌深入探讨了企业“赶时髦招AI人才”的焦虑、通过黑客松内部挖掘AI人才的方法、以及“事业留人、文化留人”的留存策略。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

帮主丨36氪《AI局内人》主播（主持）

郑鹏宇丨杭州颜柯教育科技有限公司创始人

肖玛峰丨AI招聘平台TTC创始

chinese_news.title: 对话王小川：离开通用人工智能的主干道之后
chinese_news.summary:
“如果没有转型，继续走主流道路，你也会有同等程度的焦虑。”王小川说，这次转型，让他真正回归到从创业第一天就最想做的事情：造AI医生。

访谈｜邓咏仪 杨轩

文｜邓咏仪

编辑｜张雨忻

一年前，王小川带着百川智能来了一次激烈的“大刹车”：大幅缩减通用模型团队，关闭金融等多条行业线，All in医疗大模型。但与此同时，整个大模型行业却热闹非凡，大厂和创业公司轮番进行“轰炸

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：AI浓度与转化率：数字体验的实战增长法则
chinese_news.summary:
AI浓度并非越高越好，转化率的秘密在于人机共生的平衡点。

“AI应像手机一样贯穿全流程”，而面对亲子游客和老年群体，主动将AI浓度降至50%，却实现了超50%的转化率。浓度的关键是以人为本、文化温度先行。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

薛冰丨上海蜚语信息科技副总裁（主持）

崔健南丨广州搞搞镇文化科技创始人兼CEO

杨晟丨珀乐互动科技创始人

薛冰：各位嘉宾大家下午好，我是主持人薛冰，很荣幸受到36氪

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin exceed $85,000 by end of Q2 2026 (June 30)?

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin/USD with concentration in Q2 2026 on Iran deal completion risk premium + Fed Warsh dovishness, but hedge with modest long VIX call spread due to Strait of Hormuz geopolitical fragility.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump announces Iran deal 'largely negotiated'—removes tail risk, reduces oil volatility, BTC finds stability
CoinDesk: Bitcoin ready to beat stocks/bonds after underperformance
Cointelegraph: Kevin Warsh (pro-crypto Fed chair) in place despite recent BTC drawdown—suggests near-term capitulation before reversal
investment_theses.counter_view: Spot ETF outflows ($2.26B in two weeks per CoinDesk) signal institutional hesitation; hawkish inflation data (CNBC: travel/recreation prices rising steeply) could force Warsh to pause easing sooner than crypto markets expect.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD spot or CME microcontracts; simultaneous short VIX call spreads (buy 25 calls, sell 30 calls on 60-day expiry) to cap downside from geopolitical spike while participating in upside

investment_theses.thesis: Long Ethereum outright and long ETH/BTC ratio on thesis that AI agent payment infrastructure (crypto rails) monetizes on Layer 2 (Arbitrum, Optimism) before standalone AI tokens plateau; Clarity Act yield-as-service exemption catalyzes institutional staking.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Crypto rails becoming the default payment layer for AI agents
CoinDesk: Clarity Act could spark a boom in crypto 'yield-as-a-service'
36Kr (Beijing AI conference): Next killer AI product must have real-time on-chain interaction and transaction settlement
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin's store-of-value narrative still dominates; Ethereum's Shanghai (Shanghai staking) gains already priced in; AI token competition (HYPE, RAIL, VVV) could cannibalize base-layer Ethereum value.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH spot + long 1-month call spreads on ETH/BTC ratio (buy 0.12 ratio calls, sell 0.15 ratio calls); or long Arbitrum (ARB) governance token as proxy for Layer 2 monetization if ARB trading

investment_theses.thesis: Short U.S. travel/recreation equities (airline/hotel indices) into Memorial Day / early June 2026 on persistent fuel costs and inflation, but cover if Iran deal is finalized (removes tail risk to oil prices).
supporting_signals: CNBC: Travel, recreation, food prices seeing 'particularly steep increases'
CNBC: Spirit's collapse and high fuel prices test limits of summer vacation spending
CNBC: Unofficial start of summer travel season at Memorial Day weekend will reveal how much travelers willing to pay
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal completion could crater energy prices overnight, triggering short squeeze; pent-up post-holiday demand may exceed analyst expectations; airline pricing power remains historically strong.
investment_theses.expression: Short Russell 2000 travel-exposed small caps (IYH consumer discretionary ETF, downweight airlines) or short airline-specific names (UAL, DAL) via put spreads; place stop-loss if Iran deal signed

investment_theses.thesis: Long privacy-focused crypto assets (Zcash, Railgun) on thesis that AI-driven surveillance and quantum-threat risk create persistent demand for cryptographically hardened privacy; underpriced relative to macro trend in AI threat modeling.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: AI is speeding up the quantum threat to crypto, security experts warn
Crypto trending: Zcash (ZEC) and Railgun (RAIL) listed; sustained momentum
Security narrative in crypto Twitter: privacy as hedge against state surveillance and AI deanonymization
investment_theses.counter_view: Privacy coins face sustained regulatory headwinds (FinCEN, EU Travel Rule); privacy features may be priced into Monero and other competitors; quantum-resistant crypto infrastructure still ~5-10 years away, not imminent.
investment_theses.expression: Long ZEC and RAIL via spot or 2-3 month call options; or construct a 'privacy hedge basket' (ZEC 40%, RAIL 40%, Monero proxy 20%) rebalanced monthly

investment_theses.thesis: Long U.S. dollar (DXY) on thesis that geopolitical fragility (Iran ceasefire uncertainty, Strait of Hormuz risk), coupled with persistent U.S. inflation (travel/recreation), keeps safe-haven bid intact through Q2 2026 despite Warsh dovishness.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Fragile ceasefire in place since April 8; U.S. and Iran jockey over Strait of Hormuz
CNBC: Travel/recreation/food inflation particularly steep; risk of 'stickiness' in headline CPI
Geopolitical: Pakistan train blast (20+ military personnel), Chinese mining disaster, Russia attacks on Ukraine—global instability supports USD bid
investment_theses.counter_view: Warsh Fed chair + Trump pro-crypto stance signal policy pivot toward lower rates; Bitcoin strength would be accompanied by USD weakness; emerging markets could outperform on risk-on sentiment if Iran deal finalizes.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY spot ETF (UUP) or long USD/EUR forward contracts; pair trade: long DXY / short commodity index (DBC) to express 'safe-haven into inflation' thesis
